column1: Juan Soto stands out as the top pick, bringing a strong track record of consistency with hits in 90% of his games and a favorable home matchup against Michael Lorenzen. Bobby Witt Jr. offers another reliable option, riding a recent hot stretch and enjoying a park boost with the platoon edge. Matt Olson and Drake Baldwin also benefit from advantageous matchups at home, but Soto’s steady production and matchup make him the most dependable choice today.
